\tzpentry{ID4818}{Mode Frequency Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4818 introduces Mode Frequency Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\MaxwellStress \\implies \\omega[t] = \\omega[0] \\exp\\left(\\int_0^t \\gamma_{\\text{amp}} d\\tau\\right)\n\\end{equation}
